title: Looking for Category Manager at Xpressbees

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at Xpressbees
jsonLd.description:
Xpressbees invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Ludhiana location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Xpressbees:
Xpressbees is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Xpressbees!
